data.title: Trump's Tariff Policies Preserved Amid Appeals Battle
data.description:
A trade court panel ruled that Trump did not have the authority to roll out the majority of his recently threatened tariffs. An appeals court stayed the ruling while it sorts out each side's arguments.
source: https://www.bankless.com/read/trumps-tariff-policies-hit-by-trade-court-repudiation

data.title: Congress Rolls Out New Crypto Market Structure Bill—What Does It Actually Do?
data.description:

data.title: Kazakhstan President Unveils “CryptoCity” Pilot Zone – Here is What You Need to Know
data.description:
Kazakhstan’s "Cryptocity" has been announced by President Tokayev as a pilot zone in Alatau, operating under a regulated framework that has allowed residents and firms to use cryptocurrencies for meals, services, real estate deals, and investment activity, advancing the nation’s digital finance plans.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/kazakhstan-president-unveils-cryptocity-pilot-zone-here-is-what-you-need-to-know/

data.title: Ethereum Foundation developer warns Bitcoin security is a disaster waiting to happen
data.description:
Ethereum Foundation researcher Justin Drake has warned about the security of the Bitcoin Network. Drake shared his view on X, noting that the Bitcoin Proof of Work (PoW) consensus mechanism is a ticking time bomb. The blockchain security expert, one of the masterminds behind the Merge, i. e. , Ethereum transition from PoW to Proof of Stake […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ethereum-foundation-developer-warns-bitcoin-security-is-a-disaster-waiting-to-happen/

data.title: Nigel Farage Vows to Establish BTC Reserve and Pass Pro-Crypto Legislation Once in Government
data.description:
Reform UK leader Nigel Farage promised today to pass crypto-friendly legislation and establish a bitcoin BTC reserve at the Bank of England if he comes into government.“We have put together… the Crypto Assets and Digital Finance Bill. We will campaign for this, and we will put it in place when we win in the general election,” Farage said on stage at the Bitcoin conference in Las Vegas.“We are going to launch, in Britain, a crypto revolution
source: https://www.coindesk.com/policy/2025/05/29/nigel-farage-vows-to-establish-btc-reserve-and-pass-pro-crypto-legislation-once-in-government
